name: D-Ribose
summary: Pentose sugar involved in ATP synthesis with limited evidence in fatigue/cardiac populations.
description: D-ribose provides a substrate for nucleotide and ATP-related metabolism; mechanistic rationale centers on energy repletion during increased demand.
contraindications: diabetes or hypoglycemia or other blood sugar sensitivity due to insulin secretion that can lower blood glucose
diabetes medication or insulin due to additive hypoglycemia risk
perioperative use around any medical procedure requiring blood sugar monitoring warrants clinician guidance due to possible glycemic effects
pregnancy or breastfeeding without clinician guidance due to insufficient safety data
